ai_summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced July 29, 2026, as the record date for determining shareholders entitled to receive dividends for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The payment will commence from August 6, 2026, subject to approval at the Annual General Meeting scheduled for August 5, 2026. This update indicates the company's commitment to shareholder returns for the past fiscal year, with no apparent red flags in this regulatory intimation.
